mustPass: Has a dedicated home route at '/' and a dedicated contact route.
Routes reflect this industry's needs by including services and a page for avtal/priser.
All default routes have matching sectionsPerRoute entries.
Copy framework prioritizes trust, clarity, availability and real qualifications without invented claims.
Recommended dossiers only use allowed dossier ids.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic local-service structure that omits security-specific needs like avtal, jour or trust/authorisation context.
Overpromising safety outcomes, guaranteed prevention or official authority status.
Invented certifications, client counts, response times or geographic coverage.
Pricing presentation that suggests fixed universal rates for custom security assignments.
Sensational or fear-based copy that undermines credibility.
